Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**************************************************************
 Composition

 We show that the pullback functor has a left biadjoint using
 universal arrows. The left biadjoint is given on objects by
 composition.

 Contents
 1. Action on objects
 2. The unit
 3. Fullness
 4. Faithfulness
 5. Essentially surjective
 6. Universal arrow
 **************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Slice.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.UniversalArrow.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.PullbackFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.PullbackFunctions.
Import PullbackFunctions.Notations.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Composition.
  Context {B : bicat_with_pb}
          (HB : is_univalent_2_1 B)
          {b₁ b₂ : B}
          (f : b₁ --> b₂).

  (**
   1. Action on objects
   *)
  Definition comp_ob
    : slice_bicat b₁ → slice_bicat b₂
    := λ h, make_ob_slice (pr2 h · f).

  (**
   2. The unit
   *)
  Definition comp_unit_mor
             {x : B}
             (h : x --> b₁)
    : x --> f /≃ (h · f)
    := h ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (h · f) ] (id₁ x).

  Definition comp_unit_inv2cell
             {x : B}
             (h : x --> b₁)
    : invertible_2cell
        h
        (comp_unit_mor h · pr2 (pb_psfunctor B f (comp_ob (make_ob_slice h))))
    := inv_of_invertible_2cell
         (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1
            h (id₁ x)
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (h · f))).

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h: slice_bicat b₁
slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h, pb_psfunctor B f (comp_ob h) ⟧

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h: slice_bicat b₁
slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h, pb_psfunctor B f (comp_ob h) ⟧

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h: slice_bicat b₁
B ⟦ pr1 h, pr1 (pb_psfunctor B f (comp_ob h)) ⟧
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h: slice_bicat b₁
invertible_2cell (pr2 h)
  (?g · pr2 (pb_psfunctor B f (comp_ob h)))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h: slice_bicat b₁
B ⟦ pr1 h, pr1 (pb_psfunctor B f (comp_ob h)) ⟧
 exact (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h)).
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h: slice_bicat b₁
invertible_2cell (pr2 h)
  (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h)
   · pr2 (pb_psfunctor B f (comp_ob h)))
 exact (comp_unit_inv2cell (pr2 h)).
  Defined.

  (**
   3. Fullness
   *)
  Definition comp_full_cell
             {h₁ : slice_bicat b₁}
             {h₂ : slice_bicat b₂}
             (α β : comp_ob h₁ --> h₂)
             (p : comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α
                  ==>
                  comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β)
    : pr1 α ==> pr1 β
    := linvunitor _
       • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 _ _ _)^-1 ▹ _)
       • rassociator _ _ _
       • (_ ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))^-1)
       • lassociator _ _ _
       • (pr1 p ▹ π₂)
       • rassociator _ _ _
       • (_ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 _ _)
       • lassociator _ _ _
       • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 _ _ _ ▹ _)
       • lunitor _.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
cell_slice_homot α β (comp_full_cell α β p)

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
cell_slice_homot α β (comp_full_cell α β p)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α • (comp_full_cell α β p ▹ pr2 h₂) = pr12 β

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• (((((((((((linvunitor (pr1 α) • (... ^-1 ▹ pr1 α))
            • rassociator
                ((pr2 h₁)
                 ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (...)] 
                 (id₁ ...)) π₂ (pr1 α))
           • ((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 ...))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1))
          • lassociator
              ((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                     (pr1 (comp_ob h₁))))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂) • (pr1 p ▹ π₂))
        • rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
            (pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) β)) π₂)
       • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))
      • lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β))
     • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr1 β)) • lunitor (pr1 β)) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr12 β

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• (((((((((((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((... ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
           • (rassociator
                ((pr2 h₁)
                 ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (...)] 
                 (id₁ ...)) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • (((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 ...))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (lassociator
              ((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                     (pr1 (comp_ob h₁))))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
            (pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) β)) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • ((pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
          ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • (lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
        ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) = pr12 β

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (rassociator
             ((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 ...))) π₂
             (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (((pr2 h₁)
           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
           (id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)))
           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • (lassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁))))
           (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
         (pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) β)) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • ((pr1 (comp_unit h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))
      ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
     ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
     ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) • (lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr12 β

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
           (id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (rassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)))
      ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • (lassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)))) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
    ▹ pr2 h₂)) • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
((((pr12 β
    • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr2 h₂)
         (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (pr1 β))) ^-1)
   • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr2 h₂)
        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr1 β)
           (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f))))) ^-1)
  • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr2 h₂)
       (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
          (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β))) ^-1)
 • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr2 h₂)
      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
         (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
         (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))) ^-1)
• (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr2 h₂)
     (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
        (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
        (pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) β)) π₂)) ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (rassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
     ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • (lassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
• ((pr1 p ▹ π₂) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
     ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
     π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
         ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (rassociator
         ((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (lassociator
       ((pr2 h₁)
        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
        (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β))
    π₂ (pr2 h₂) =
(((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
      ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
      π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β))
    π₂ (pr2 h₂)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (((pr1 p ▹ π₂) ▹ pr2 h₂)
                  • rassociator
                      (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                       · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • rassociator
                   (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                    · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • (pr1 p ▹ π₂ · pr2 h₂))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • rassociator
                   (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                    · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(pr12 α
 • ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
    • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
         ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
       • ((rassociator
             ((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
             (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
          • ((((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
               ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
              ▹ pr2 h₂)
             • ((lassociator
                   ((pr2 h₁)
                    ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                   (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
                • (rassociator
                     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                   • (pr1 p ▹ π₂ · pr2 h₂))))))))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
   ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1) =
(pr12 β
 • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
    • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
         ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
       • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
             (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
          • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
              ▹ pr2 h₂)
             • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                   (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
                • rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))))))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
   ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂ · pr2 h₂)
                     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                        · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                        ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                     ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))))))

                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (pr1 p ▹ π₁ · f)))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)

                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)

            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

                       · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                       ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                      • (pr1 p ▹ π₁ · f)))))))))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β))
    π₁ f =
(pr12 β
 • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
    • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
         ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

                   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))))))))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β))
    π₁ f

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator

                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • ((pr1 p ▹ π₁ · f)
                        • lassociator
                            (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                             · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f)))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • lassociator
                         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f)))))))

                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)

                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f

                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)

                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • lassociator
                         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f)))))))

b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
d:= pr2 p: (λ η : pr1 (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α) ==>
       pr1 (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2 (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α))
   (pr2 (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β)))
  (pr1 p)
pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
d:= pr2 p: ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
 ^-1
 • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
    • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁)) • (pr1 p ▹ π₁) =
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁)
pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁

 ^-1

rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁

   • ((pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
          π₁))

   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
H: pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
    π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((pr1 p ▹ π₁) ▹ f))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • lassociator
                         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f)))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
H: pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
    π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((pr1 p ▹ π₁) ▹ f))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
H: pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
    π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁
?b =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • lassociator
                         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f)))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
H: pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
    π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((pr1 p ▹ π₁) ▹ f))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
H: pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
    π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁
pr1 p ▹ π₁ = ?t2

      exact H.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
H: pr1 p ▹ π₁ =
((rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
    π₁
  • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))
 • (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((((rassociator ... ... π₁
                              • (...))
                             • (pr1 ... ◃ ... ^-1))
                            • lassociator
                                (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁) ▹ f))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • lassociator
                         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f)))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((((rassociator ... ... π₁
                              • (...))
                             • (pr1 ... ◃ ... ^-1))
                            • lassociator
                                (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁) ▹ f))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • lassociator
                         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f)))))))

• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)

                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • lassociator
                         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)

            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((((rassociator ... ... π₁
                              • (...))
                             • (pr1 ... ◃ ... ^-1))
                            • lassociator
                                (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁) ▹ f)))))))))

   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))

             ▹ pr2 h₂)

                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • lassociator
                         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f))))))) =
?b

                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)

                     • lassociator

                          · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f))))))) =

h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
id₂ (pr2 h₂)
⋆⋆ lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
     π₂
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β))
    π₂ (pr2 h₂) = ?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
  (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂))
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 β) (π₂ · pr2 h₂)) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂))
     • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
         (f /≃₁ pr2 β) (π₂ · pr2 h₂)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β))
    π₁ f = ?t2

rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
  (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂))
   • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 β) (π₂ · pr2 h₂)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
          ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
         • lassociator
             (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β))
             π₁ f))) = ?t2

  (π₂ · pr2 h₂)

b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
  ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 β ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
     (π₁ · f))

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 β ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
• (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
     (π₁ · f)
   • lassociator
       (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f) =

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 β ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
• (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ f)
    • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₁) f)
   • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ ▹ f)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 β
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                              π₁ f)
                         • lassociator
                             (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                             (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₁) f)
                        • (lassociator
                             (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                             (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ ▹ f))))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((((rassociator ... ... π₁
                              • (...))
                             • (pr1 ... ◃ ... ^-1))
                            • lassociator
                                (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁) ▹ f)))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 β
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                          ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
                              π₁ f)
                         • lassociator
                             (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                             (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₁) f)
                        • (lassociator
                             (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                             (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ ▹ f))))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((((rassociator ... ... π₁
                              ▹ f) • ((...) ▹ f))
                            • ((pr1 ... ◃ ... ^-1) ▹ f))
                           • (lassociator
                                (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ ▹ f))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ ...)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell ...)) ^-1
            ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
         (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 β ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ f))
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₁) f)
• (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
     π₁ ▹ f) =
(((((((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • ((... ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (rassociator
              ((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (...)] 
               (id₁ ...)) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
           ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (lassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
            (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • rassociator
          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
          (pr2 h₂))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
        ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
    • lassociator
        (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f)
   • (rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
        π₁ ▹ f))
  • ((pr1 (comp_unit h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α))
     ▹ f))
 • ((pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ f))
• (lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁
   ▹ f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (... · f)))
           ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
           (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 β ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ f))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₁) f =
((((((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (rassociator
             ((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
             (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (((pr2 h₁)
           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
           (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • (lassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
           (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • rassociator
         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
         (pr2 h₂))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
       ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
   • lassociator
       (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f)
  • (rassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁
     ▹ f))
 • ((pr1 (comp_unit h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α))
    ▹ f))
• ((pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
      ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)) =
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • (rassociator ... π₂ ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • ((... ⊗[ ...] ... ◃ ... ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (lassociator
              ((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (...)] 
               (id₁ ...)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator
            (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α))
            π₂ (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
          ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
      • lassociator
          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁
          f)
     • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f))
    • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ▹ f))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ f))
  • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
      (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₁) f)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ f))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 β ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                      (pr2 h₂))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((rassociator
                              (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f)
                           • (((comp_unit_mor ...
                                ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                    ...) ▹ f)
                              • (((...) ▹ f)
                                 • (rassociator ...
                                      ... f • (...)))))))))))))

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂

f /≃₁ pr2 β ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂) = ?t2

      exact (pb_on_1cell_cell f (pr2 β)).

      (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
• ?Hε ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
is_invertible_2cell
  (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ ((((((lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ f
           • (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β) ▹ f))
          • pb_cell f (pr2 (comp_ob h₁)))
         • (π₂ ◃ pr2 β))
        • lassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))

      is_iso ; apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((((((pr12 α • (...)) • ((...) ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • (rassociator (... ⊗[ ...] ...) π₂ (pr1 α)
             ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (...)] 
             (id₁ ...) ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f ...) ^-1)
            ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (lassociator
             ((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
             (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • rassociator
           (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
           (pr2 h₂))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
     • lassociator
         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f)
    • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
         (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ▹ f))
  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₁) f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ f) =
((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
         ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
       ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
      (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                       (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ f)
                       (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
                          (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β))))
                    (pb_cell f (pr2 (comp_ob h₁))))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker π₂
                    (pr2 β)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator π₂
                 (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)))
           (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr2 h₂)
              (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                 (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
           π₂ (pr2 h₂)))) ^-1

   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁ f) =
((((((((((((pr12 β • (...)) • ((...) ▹ pr2 h₂))

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • ((... ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (rassociator
              ((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (...)] 
               (id₁ ...)) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))

            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
           ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (lassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
            (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • rassociator
          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
          (pr2 h₂))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
        ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
    • lassociator
        (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f))
  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ▹ f))
 • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ f))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₁) f =
(((((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • ((... ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
              (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
           ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
           (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)))
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1 ▹ f))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((rassociator
                              (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f)
                           • (((comp_unit_mor ...
                                ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                    ...) ▹ f)
                              • (((...) ▹ f)
                                 • rassociator
                                     (comp_unit_mor
                                        ...)
                                     (... · π₁) f))))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • ((comp_unit_mor ...
                                  ◃ ... ^-1)
                                 • (comp_unit_mor ...
                                    ◃ (...)))))))))))))

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((rassociator
                              (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f)
                           • (((comp_unit_mor ...
                                ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                    ...) ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (comp_unit_mor ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • (comp_unit_mor ...
                                    ◃ (...))))))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • ((comp_unit_mor ...
                                  ◃ ... ^-1)
                                 • (comp_unit_mor ...
                                    ◃ (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • ((... ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (rassociator
              ((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (...)] 
               (id₁ ...)) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
           ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (lassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
            (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • rassociator
          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
          (pr2 h₂))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
        ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
    • lassociator
        (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f))
  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ▹ f))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1 ▹ f)) =
(((((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • ((... ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
              (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
           ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
           (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)))
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1 ▹ f))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (rassociator
             ((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
             (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (((pr2 h₁)
           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
           (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • (lassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
           (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • rassociator
         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
         (pr2 h₂))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
       ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
   • lassociator
       (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f)
  • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f))
 • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ▹ f))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₁ f =
((((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
             (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1)

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
