                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((rassociator
                              (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f)
                           • (((comp_unit_mor ...
                                ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                    ...) ▹ f)
                              • rassociator
                                  (comp_unit_mor
                                     (pr2 h₁)) π₁ f)))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_cell f ...) ^-1)))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((rassociator
                              (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f)
                           • (rassociator
                                (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁))
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₁) f
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                      ... ▹ f)))))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_cell f ...) ^-1)))))))))))

pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))

             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator

                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)

                                (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₁) f
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                      ... ▹ f)))))))))))) =
?b

                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor

                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₁ f
                        • ((rassociator
                              (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f)
                           • (rassociator
                                (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁))
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₁) f
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                      ... ▹ f)))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α))
  π₁ f
• ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
      π₁ ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₁) f
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f)))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α))
    π₁ f
  • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ ▹ f))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₁) f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α))
   π₁ f
 • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
      π₁ ▹ f))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₁) f = ?y'

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α))
   π₁ f
 • id₂ f
   ⋆⋆ rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₁) f = ?y'

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α))
  π₁ f
• (id₂ f
   ⋆⋆ rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁
   • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₁) f) = ?y'

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
  (π₁ · f)
• lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f
  ⋆⋆ id₂ (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) = ?y'

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
  (π₁ · f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • ((rassociator
                           (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                           (f /≃₁ pr2 α) (π₁ · f)
                         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ lassociator
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                (pr2 α) ▹ f)))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_cell f ...) ^-1)))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • ((rassociator
                           (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                           (f /≃₁ pr2 α) (π₁ · f)
                         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ lassociator
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                (pr2 α) ▹ f)))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_cell f ...) ^-1)))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((lassociator
                  ((pr2 h₁)
                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • (rassociator
                    (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂ (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                      ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
                     • ((rassociator
                           (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                           (f /≃₁ pr2 α) (π₁ · f)
                         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ lassociator
                                (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                (pr2 α) ▹ f)))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(lassociator
   ((pr2 h₁)
    ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
   (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)
• (rassociator
     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
     (pr2 h₂)
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
       ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
            (f /≃₁ pr2 α) (π₁ · f)
          • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
             ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f))))) =
?t2

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
    (π₂ · pr2 h₂)
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f)) = ?t20

        apply idpath.

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(lassociator
   ((pr2 h₁)
    ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1

   (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ ▹ pr2 h₂)

     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
     (pr2 h₂)

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                    (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
                  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                         (pr2 h₂)))
                 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                    ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                       ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))
                • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_cell f ...) ^-1)))))))))))

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

                             π₁ f)
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)

pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

             ▹ pr2 h₂)

                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_cell f ...) ^-1)))))))))))

   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)

                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_cell f ...) ^-1))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                (pr2 α) ▹ f))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                          (pr2 h₂))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)
                            ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β)
                                (pr2 h₂))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ (π₂ ◃ ... ^-1))
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (pb_cell f ...) ^-1))))))))))) =
?b

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
  ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂)
• (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 β · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ (pr2 h₂))
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)

                   ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
                  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1))))))) =
?t2

   ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1) = ?t2

p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (π₂ · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                     • (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                (pr2 α) ▹ f))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (π₂ · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                     • (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                (pr2 α) ▹ f))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (π₂ · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
                  • ((π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                     • (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
 ▹ pr2 h₂)
• (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (π₂ · pr1 β)
     (pr2 h₂)
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ (rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1)))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
 ▹ pr2 h₂)
• (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (π₂ · pr1 β)
     (pr2 h₂)
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
            ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1)))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
    ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (π₂ · pr1 β)
       (pr2 h₂))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
    (pr2 h₂)
  • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
      (pr1 β · pr2 h₂))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1) = ?t2

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
  (pr2 h₂)
• (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
     (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1))) = ?t2

      apply idpath.

pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

                ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))

                  ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1)))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)

            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)

              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)

                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)

                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂

                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)

                           ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                (pr2 α) ▹ f))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
       (pr2 h₂))
  • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
      (pr1 β · pr2 h₂))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1) =
((((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (... · f)))
           ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • (rassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
           (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • (((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
      (pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
     (pr1 β · pr2 h₂))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)) =
(((((((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ ...)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell ...)) ^-1
            ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • (rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • (((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
     • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
         (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f)))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))))
  ^-1

         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                 (pr2 α) ▹ f))
                           • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                              ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                 (pr2 α) ▹ f))
                           • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                              ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
              (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                 (pr2 α) ▹ f))
                           • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                              ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
              (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))))))

                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))

                              ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))))))))))) =

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f) = ?t2

      apply mor_to_pb_obj_cell.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                 (pr2 α) ▹ f))
                           • ((((...)
                                • linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                    ...)
                               • (... ^-1 ▹ ... · f))
                              • rassociator
                                  ((pr2 h₁)
                                   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                        (...)] (id₁
                                                 ...))
                                  π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f))))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
              (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                 (pr2 α) ▹ f))
                           • (lassociator
                                ((pr2 h₁)
                                 ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                      (...)] (id₁ ...))
                                π₁ f
                              • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1
                                    ... ... ... ▹ f)
                                 • (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
              (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                       (pr2 h₂))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α
                         ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1))
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
                             π₁ f)
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
                                 (pr2 α) ▹ f))
                           • (lassociator
                                ((pr2 h₁)
                                 ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                      (...)] (id₁ ...))
                                π₁ f
                              • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1
                                    ... ... ... ▹ f)
                                 • (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
                (pr2 h₁ · f)))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • (rassociator ... π₂ ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • ((... ⊗[ ...] ... ◃ ... ^-1) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
             (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
           ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f)))
    • lassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ f))
  • linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr2 h₁ · f))
• rassociator
    ((pr2 h₁)
     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) =
((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
      (pr2 h₂))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((((((pr12 α • (...)) • ((...) ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • (rassociator (... ⊗[ ...] ...) π₂ (pr1 α)
             ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (...)] 
             (id₁ ...) ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f ...) ^-1)
            ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
            (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ (pr2 h₂)))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) ^-1)))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f)))
   • lassociator
       ((pr2 h₁)
        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
        (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
  • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ f))
 • linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
• ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
   ▹ pr2 h₁ · f) =
(((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
     (pr2 h₂))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (rassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
     ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ (pr2 h₂)) =
((((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
            (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
      • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr2 h₁ · f)
           (is_invertible_2cell_inv
              (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))))) ^-1)
     • (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ^-1)
    • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
         (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))))
      ^-1)
   • (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f) ^-1)
  • (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
       (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
          (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)))) ^-1)
 • (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
      (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
      (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
         π₁ f)) ^-1)
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
        (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)))))
  ^-1

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (rassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
     ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ (pr2 h₂)) =
((((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
            (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
      • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
         ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)) • lunitor (pr2 h₁ · f))
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ f))
   • rassociator
       ((pr2 h₁)
        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
        (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1 ▹ f)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (f /≃₁ pr2 α ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                      (pr2 h₂))))))) =
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
               • (lunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f ...)
                               ^-1 ▹ f))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (f /≃₁ ...) π₁ f)
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (f /≃₁ ...
                                    ◃ pb_cell f ...))))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
               • (lunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f ...)
                               ^-1 ▹ f))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (f /≃₁ ...) π₁ f)
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (f /≃₁ ...
                                    ◃ pb_cell f ...)))))))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                      (pr2 h₂)))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
               • (lunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f ...)
                               ^-1 ▹ f))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (f /≃₁ ...) π₁ f)
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (f /≃₁ ...
                                    ◃ pb_cell f ...)))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                      (pr2 h₂)))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
               • (lunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f ...)
                               ^-1 ▹ f))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (f /≃₁ ...) π₁ f)
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ (f /≃₁ ...
                                    ◃ pb_cell f ...)))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
f /≃₁ pr2 α ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂) = ?t2

      apply pb_on_1cell_cell.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
               • (lunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f ...)
                               ^-1 ▹ f))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (f /≃₁ ...) π₁ f)
                              • (comp_unit_mor
                                   (pr2 h₁)
                                 ◃ ((...)
                                    • rassociator ...
                                        π₂ ...)))))))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                      (pr2 h₂)))))))

   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)

           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)

                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))

                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))

                                                 (pr1

                          π₁ f

                               ^-1 ▹ f))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (f /≃₁ ...) π₁ f)
                              • (((...) • (...))
                                 • (comp_unit_mor ...
                                    ◃ rassociator ...
                                        π₂ ...)))))))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂)
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
                      (pr2 h₂)))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • lunitor (... · f))
          • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ... ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f))
         • rassociator
             ((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
           ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1 ▹ f)))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f))
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f)))
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α)))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₂)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ (pr2 h₂)) =
(((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
    • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))

        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
     ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 α · π₂) (pr2 h₂))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ (pr2 h₂))

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))

          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

    ▹ pr2 h₂))

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
               • (lunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f ...)
                               ^-1 ▹ f))
                           • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (f /≃₁ ...) π₁ f)
                              • ((comp_unit_mor ...
                                  ◃ lassociator ... π₁
                                      f)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1 ▹ f))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f)
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f))
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
             ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))
            • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
◃ (((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1 ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f
      • (lassociator (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ f
         • ((pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α) ▹ f)
            • (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)
               • ((π₂ ◃ pr2 α)
                  • lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))))))) =
?t2

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
               • (lunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)
                              • ((π₂ ◃ pr2 α)
                                 • lassociator π₂
                                     (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))))))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
             (π₂ · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))))

pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
