                           ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)
                              • ((π₂ ◃ pr2 α)
                                 • lassociator π₂
                                     (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))))))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))

            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
             (π₂ · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))))

α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
               • ((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr2 h₁)
                     f • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)
                              • ((π₂ ◃ pr2 α)
                                 • lassociator π₂
                                     (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
• ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
    ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
   • ((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr2 h₁) f
       • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
      • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
          ^-1 ▹ f)
         • (rassociator
              ((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)
                  • ((π₂ ◃ pr2 α)
                     • lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• ((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr2 h₁) f
    • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
   • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ f)
      • (rassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f
         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
            ◃ (pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)
               • ((π₂ ◃ pr2 α)
                  • lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
     ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
    • lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr2 h₁) f)
   • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
  • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ ((pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f) • (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))
      • lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((lassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
  • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ ((pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f) • (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))
      • lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • (((((lassociator
                     ((pr2 h₁)
                      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                           (... · f)] (id₁ (...)) · π₂)
                     (pr2 h₁) f
                   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ ...)
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            ...) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
                  • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
                 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f))
                • rassociator
                    ((pr2 h₁)
                     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                    π₁ f)
               • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                  ◃ ((pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)
                      • (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))
                     • lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
             (π₂ · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr12 β
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • (((((lassociator
                     ((pr2 h₁)
                      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                           (... · f)] (id₁ (...)) · π₂)
                     (pr2 h₁) f
                   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ ...)
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            ...) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
                  • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
                 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f))
                • rassociator
                    ((pr2 h₁)
                     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                    π₁ f)
               • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                    ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))
                   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α)))
                  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     ◃ lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))))))) =
pr12 α
• ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
            (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
             (π₂ · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • ((... ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
             (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
       • lassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂)
           (pr2 h₁) f)
      • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
          ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ f))
   • rassociator
       ((pr2 h₁)
        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
        (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ lassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)) =
(((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • (rassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (π₂ · pr1 α)
    (pr2 h₂)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
            (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))

          ((pr2 h₁)

         ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ f))
  • rassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α)) =
((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))

       ((pr2 h₁)
        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
        (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (π₂ · pr1 α)
     (pr2 h₂))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator π₂ (pr1 α)
        (pr2 h₂))) ^-1

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((pr12 α • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (rassociator
       ((pr2 h₁)
        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
        (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (π₂ · pr1 α)
     (pr2 h₂))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ rassociator π₂ (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
((((((((((pr12 β • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
            (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
      • lassociator
          ((pr2 h₁)
           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
           (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
     • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
         ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ f))
  • rassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 α) • lunitor (pr1 α · pr2 h₂))
   • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
    (pr1 α · pr2 h₂) =
((((((((((((id₁ ... ◃ pr12 β) • lunitor (... · ...))
          • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
            (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
      • lassociator
          ((pr2 h₁)
           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
           (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
     • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
         ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ f))
  • rassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 α)
    • (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
       • (lunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)))
   • (linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂))
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
    (pr1 α · pr2 h₂) =
((((((((((((id₁ ... ◃ pr12 β)
           • (lassociator ... ... ... • (...)))
          • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
            (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
      • lassociator
          ((pr2 h₁)
           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
           (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
     • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
         ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ f))
  • rassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 α)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α)
              (pr2 h₂)
            • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                   (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
                ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
               • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                   π₂ (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)))))) =
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator
                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       ((pr2 h₁)
                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁))
                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 α)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α)
              (pr2 h₂)
            • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                   (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
                ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
               • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                   π₂ (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)))))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator
                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       ((pr2 h₁)
                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁))
                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
       • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁

                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f

h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 α)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
       • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
          ^-1 ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂))
      • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
          (pr1 α · pr2 h₂))) = ?b

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
• ((rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
       ^-1 ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂))

       (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)) = ?t2

((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
  • rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₂ (id₁ (pr1 h₁) · (pr1 α · pr2 h₂))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂))

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
    (pr1 α · pr2 h₂) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
   • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
       (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)) =
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator
                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       ((pr2 h₁)
                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁))
                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
   • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
       (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator
                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       ((pr2 h₁)
                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁))
                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))

  ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)

B: bicat_with_pb

b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
     (pr2 h₁ · f)

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
     (pr2 h₁ · f)
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr12 α))) =
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator
                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       ((pr2 h₁)
                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁))
                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
 • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
     (pr2 h₁ · f))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr12 α)) =
(((((((((((((...) • lassociator ... ... ...)
           • (lunitor ... ▹ pr2 h₂))
          • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
             ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
            (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
      • lassociator
          ((pr2 h₁)
           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
           (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
     • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
         ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ f))
  • rassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr2 α))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) =
((((((((((((id₁ ... ◃ pr12 β)
           • lassociator (id₁ ...) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
          • (lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
         • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ ...)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell ...)) ^-1
            ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
     • lassociator
         ((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
  • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) =
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)

                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)

                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)

                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁))
                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • (comp_unit_mor ...
                                    ◃ pb_cell f ...))))))))))))

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator
                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       ((pr2 h₁)
                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁))
                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • (comp_unit_mor ...
                                    ◃ pb_cell f ...)))))))))))) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator
                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂)
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       ((pr2 h₁)
                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁))
                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f
                                 • (comp_unit_mor ...
                                    ◃ pb_cell f ...)))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
             ▹ pr2 h₂)

                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂)

                   ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)

                        · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f

                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁)
                         ▹ f)
                        • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                           • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 ...
                                  ... ...) ^-1 ▹ f)
                              • (rassociator
                                   (... ⊗[ ...] ...)
                                   π₁ f

                                    ◃ pb_cell f ...)))))))))))) =

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
• ((linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
            • (lassociator
                 ((pr2 h₁)
                  ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
               • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                  • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                        • (rassociator
                             ((pr2 h₁)
                              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                             π₁ f
                           • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                              ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))))))))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((((lunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (linvunitor (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
        • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ ...)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell ...)) ^-1
            ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
     • lassociator
         ((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
  • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) =
?t2

b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((((lunitor (pr1 β) • linvunitor (pr1 β))

          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
  • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) =
?t2

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂

     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) =

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • (((((((((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 ... ... ...) ^-1
               ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
             • rassociator
                 (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
                 (pr2 h₂))
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
               ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
           • lassociator
               ((pr2 h₁)
                ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂)
               (pr2 h₁) f)
          • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
         • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f))
       • rassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

                (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
         • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f))
       • rassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))) = ?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
lassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
• (((((((((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ ...)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell ...)) ^-1
            ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
          • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
              (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
        • lassociator
            ((pr2 h₁)
             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂)
            (pr2 h₁) f)
       • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
           ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
     • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ f))
    • rassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))) =
?t2

     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (... · f)))
         ^-1 ▹ pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
            (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
       • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
           (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
     • lassociator
         ((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
  • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) =
?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
• (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂) (pr1 β)
     (pr2 h₂)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂)
        (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
         • (lassociator
              ((pr2 h₁)
               ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂)
              (pr2 h₁) f
            • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                   (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
               • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
                  • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                     • (rassociator
                          ((pr2 h₁)
                           ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                          π₁ f
                        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                           ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))))))))) =
?t2

  (pr2 h₂)

                   (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)

                      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)

                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁

                        ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))))))))) =

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • (((((((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
           • lassociator
               ((pr2 h₁)
                ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂)
               (pr2 h₁) f)
          • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
         • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f))
       • rassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((((((id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr12 β)
       • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
          ^-1 ▹ pr1 β · pr2 h₂))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
     • lassociator
         ((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
  • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

(((((((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
        ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ pr12 β))
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
     • lassociator
         ((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)

          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))

        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) =

 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ pr12 β)
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
      • (lassociator
           ((pr2 h₁)
            ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂)
           (pr2 h₁) f
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
            • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
               • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
                  • (rassociator
                       ((pr2 h₁)
                        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                              (pr1 h₁)))
                       π₁ f
                     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                        ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f))))))))) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ pr12 β)
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1)
   • (lassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
      • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
           ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
         • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
            • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                   (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ f)
               • (rassociator
                    ((pr2 h₁)
                     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                          (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
                    π₁ f
                  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                     ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)))))))) =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((((((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ pr12 β)
      • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ (pr2 β) ^-1))
     • lassociator
         ((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
    • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
        ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)) • (lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f))
  • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₁ · f)) =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
   · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f

       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))

               • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                     (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ f)
                  • (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                       (pr2 h₁ · f)
                     • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                            (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                               (... · f))) ^-1
                         ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
                        • rassociator
                            ((pr2 h₁)
                             ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                  (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
                            π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
rassociator
  ((pr2 h₁)
   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)))
  π₁ f
• (lassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f
   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
       ▹ f)
      • (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
            • rassociator
                ((pr2 h₁)
                 ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
                (pr2 h₁ · f))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((rassociator
      ((pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f
    • lassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₁ f)
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ f))
  • linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr2 h₁ · f))
• rassociator
    ((pr2 h₁)
     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((id₂
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₁ · f)
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ f))
  • linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr2 h₁ · f))
• rassociator
    ((pr2 h₁)
     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) = ?t2

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ f)
  • linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr2 h₁ · f))
• rassociator
    ((pr2 h₁)
     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
lassociator
  ((pr2 h₁)
   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
   · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
     ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
   • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
      • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
          ^-1 ▹ f)
         • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁)
                 (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ f)
              • linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr2 h₁ · f))
             • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                   (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f))
            • rassociator
                ((pr2 h₁)
                 ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                      (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
                (pr2 h₁ · f))))) =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

  ((pr2 h₁)
   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
   · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
     ▹ pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
   • ((lunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
      • ((((linvunitor (pr2 h₁) ▹ f)
           • rassociator (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) (pr2 h₁) f)
          • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f))
         • rassociator
             ((pr2 h₁)
              ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
             (pr2 h₁ · f)))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) = ?t2

      apply id2_left.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
lassociator
  ((pr2 h₁)
   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
   · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
• (rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
   • rassociator
       ((pr2 h₁)
        ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
        (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)) =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(lassociator
   ((pr2 h₁)
    ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
    · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f
 • rassociator
     ((pr2 h₁)
      ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
      (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂) (pr2 h₁) f)
• rassociator
    ((pr2 h₁)
     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
id₂
  ((pr2 h₁)
   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
   · π₂ · (pr2 h₁ · f))
• rassociator
    ((pr2 h₁)
     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f) =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr2 h₁ · f)

    apply id2_left.
  Qed.

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β

 exact (comp_full_homot α β p).

(((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
   ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂))

      (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α)) π₂
      (pr2 h₂))

    π₂ (pr2 h₂) =

    π₁ f
  • (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p) ▹ π₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator
     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)) π₁ f)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
   ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂))

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β

  π₁ f

      ◃ f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p) ▹ π₁) ▹ f)

((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p)
 ▹ π₁ · f)

   ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂))

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
is_invertible_2cell
  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1

        is_iso.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁) =
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
   • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁ • (pr1 p ▹ π₁)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁ =
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1))
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
     π₁) • (pr1 p ▹ π₁)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1))
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
     π₁) • (pr1 p ▹ π₁) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
p':= pr2 p: (λ η : pr1
         (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α) ==>
       pr1
         (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2 (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α))
   (pr2 (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β)))
  (pr1 p)
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1))
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
     π₁) • (pr1 p ▹ π₁) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
p':= pr2 p: ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
 ^-1
 • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
    • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁)) • (pr1 p ▹ π₁) =
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
^-1
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁)
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1))
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
     π₁) • (pr1 p ▹ π₁) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
p': (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
  ^-1
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1))
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₁) • (pr1 p ▹ π₁) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
 ^-1
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₁
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 α)) ^-1))
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
     π₁) • (pr1 p ▹ π₁) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₁

      exact p'.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
pr1
  (comp_unit h₁
   ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) (comp_full α β p)) ▹ π₂ =
pr1 p ▹ π₂
 
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p)
▹ π₂ = pr1 p ▹ π₂

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p) ▹ π₂) =
lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
• (pr1 p ▹ π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ (f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p ▹ π₂))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₂ =
lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
• (pr1 p ▹ π₂)

 ◃ (f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p ▹ π₂))

    π₂ = ?b

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
