◃ (f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p ▹ π₂) = ?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
f /≃₂ comp_full_homot α β p ▹ π₂ = ?t2

        apply pb_on_2cell_pr2.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)
     • (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p))
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₂ =
lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
• (pr1 p ▹ π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β)
    π₂ =
lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
• (pr1 p ▹ π₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1) =
(lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
 • (pr1 p ▹ π₂))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)) =
((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
    π₂ • (pr1 p ▹ π₂))
 • (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
      (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂) ^-1)
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
     (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv
        (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))) ^-1

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p) =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
   (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))) ^-1
• (((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ • (pr1 p ▹ π₂))
    • (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
         (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂)
      ^-1)
   • (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
        (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (is_invertible_2cell_inv
           (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))) ^-1)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p) =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
• (((lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
       (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ • (pr1 p ▹ π₂))
    • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂)
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p) =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
• (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
     π₂
   • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
      • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
           (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
            ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)) =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
   • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
      • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
         • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
            • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
               ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β) =
(rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
 • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
     ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
    • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
         (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
       • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
          • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
               (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
             • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))))))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr1 α)
• ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)) =
((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
 ▹ pr1 α)
• ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
    • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
       • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
            (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
          • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
             • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                  (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))))))
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
is_invertible_2cell
  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
   ▹ pr1 β)

     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  ▹ pr1 α)

        ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
    • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)))
• (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
   ▹ pr1 β) =
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  ▹ pr1 α)

         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
        • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
             (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
           • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
              • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                   (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))))))
    • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)))
• (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
   ▹ pr1 β)

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
is_invertible_2cell
  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  ▹ pr1 α)
 • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
        ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
    • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)))
• (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
   ▹ pr1 β) =
(((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
  ▹ pr1 α)
 • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
         ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
        • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
             (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
           • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
              • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                   (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                    ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))))))
    • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)))
• (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
   ▹ pr1 β)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ pr1 α)
    • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
          (pr1 α)
        • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
           ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
       • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
           (pr1 β)))
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
      ▹ pr1 β)) =
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
     ^-1 ▹ pr1 α)
    • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
          (pr1 α)
        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
            ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
           • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
              • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
                 • (rassociator
                      (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                      (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                    • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                       ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))))))
       • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
           (pr1 β)))
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
      ▹ pr1 β))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(linvunitor (pr1 α)
 • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ pr1 α)
     • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
           (pr1 α)
         • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
            ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
        • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β)))
    • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
       ▹ pr1 β))) • lunitor (pr1 β) =
(linvunitor (pr1 α)
 • ((((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
      ^-1 ▹ pr1 α)
     • ((rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
           (pr1 α)
         • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
             ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
            • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                 (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
               • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
                  • (rassociator
                       (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                       (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                     • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                        ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))))))
        • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 β)))
    • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
       ▹ pr1 β))) • lunitor (pr1 β)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p))
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
              (pr1 β)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
               • lunitor (pr1 β)))))) =
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
            • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
               • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
                          (pr1 β)
                        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                              (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (... · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
                           • lunitor (pr1 β))))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p))
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
              (pr1 β)
            • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                  (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
               • lunitor (pr1 β)))))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
            • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
               • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
                          (pr1 β)
                        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                              (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (... · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
                           • lunitor (pr1 β))))))))))

       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p))
   • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
      • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β

   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ (π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)))
  • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β))

    ▹ pr1 β)) • lunitor (pr1 β) = ?t2

        
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
((((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)
   • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β))
  • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β))
 • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
    ▹ pr1 β)) • lunitor (pr1 β) = ?t2

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)
• (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
   • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)

            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
          ▹ pr1 β) • lunitor (pr1 β)))) = ?t2

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
• lunitor (pr1 β) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
       ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)
      • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
          ▹ pr1 β) • lunitor (pr1 β)))) =
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
            • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
               • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
                          (pr1 β)
                        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                              (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (... · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
                           • lunitor (pr1 β))))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
       ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)
      • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
          ▹ pr1 β) • lunitor (pr1 β)))) = ?b
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
?b =
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
            • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
               • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
                          (pr1 β)
                        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                              (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (... · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
                           • lunitor (pr1 β))))))))))

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• ((id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ comp_full_cell α β p)
   • lunitor (pr1 β)) =
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
            • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
               • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
                          (pr1 β)
                        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                              (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (... · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
                           • lunitor (pr1 β))))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (lunitor (pr1 α) • comp_full_cell α β p) =
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
            • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
               • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
                          (pr1 β)
                        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                              (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (... · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
                           • lunitor (pr1 β))))))))))

linvunitor (pr1 α)

f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (lunitor (pr1 α) • comp_full_cell α β p) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
(linvunitor (pr1 α) • lunitor (pr1 α))
• comp_full_cell α β p = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
id₂ (pr1 α) • comp_full_cell α β p = ?b

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
comp_full_cell α β p =
linvunitor (pr1 α)
• (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1
    ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
      • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
              (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂
            • ((pr1 p ▹ π₂)
               • (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
                    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β))
                     • (lassociator
                          (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
                          (pr1 β)
                        • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                              (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (... · f)) ▹ pr1 β)
                           • lunitor (pr1 β))))))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
comp_full_cell α β p =
(((((((((linvunitor (pr1 α)
         • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ ...)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell ...)) ^-1
            ▹ pr1 α))
        • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
            (pr1 α))
       • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
          ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α)) ^-1))
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂) • (pr1 p ▹ π₂))
    • rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
        (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂)
   • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
      ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)))
  • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β))
 • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
    ▹ pr1 β)) • lunitor (pr1 β)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (**
   4. Faithfulness
   *)
  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
q₁ = q₂

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
q₁ = q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
         · pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) α) ==>
         pr1
           (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β),
   lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
     (pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) α)) π₂ • (z ▹ π₂))
  (maponpaths pr1 r₁ @ ! maponpaths pr1 r₂): (λ z : pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
       · pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) α) ==>
       pr1 (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β),
 lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
   (pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) α)) π₂ • (z ▹ π₂))
  (pr1 (comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁)) =
(λ z : pr1 (comp_unit h₁)
       · pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) α) ==>
       pr1 (comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β),
 lassociator (pr1 (comp_unit h₁))
   (pr1 (# (pb_psfunctor B f) α)) π₂ • (z ▹ π₂))
  (pr1 (comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂))
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H:= maponpaths
  (λ z : comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 α) ==>
         comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ pr2 β),
   lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
     (f /≃₁ pr2 α) π₂ • (z ▹ π₂))
  (maponpaths pr1 r₁ @ ! maponpaths pr1 r₂): lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
  π₂
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ f /≃₂ pr2 q₁) ▹ π₂) =
lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) (f /≃₁ pr2 α)
  π₂
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ f /≃₂ pr2 q₂) ▹ π₂)
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H: (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (f /≃₂ pr2 q₁ ▹ π₂))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (f /≃₂ pr2 q₂ ▹ π₂))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H: (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α) • (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁))
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α) • (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))
    • (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H: (((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂ =
(((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
  • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)))
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
    (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H: (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂)) =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂))
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H: (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂)) =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂))
is_invertible_2cell
  (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H: (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂)) =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂))
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁)) =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H: (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂)) =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂))
is_invertible_2cell
  (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))

        
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H: (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂)) =
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))
   • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
       ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 β)) ^-1)
      • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁))
          (f /≃₁ pr2 β) π₂))
is_invertible_2cell (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f (pr2 α))

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂:= maponpaths
  (λ z : comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (π₂ · pr1 α) ==>
         comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (π₂ · pr1 β),
   (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
      (pr1 α) • z)
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
       (pr1 β)) H₁: (λ z : comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (π₂ · pr1 α) ==>
       comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (π₂ · pr1 β),
 (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
  • z)
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
     (pr1 β))
  (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁)) =
(λ z : comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (π₂ · pr1 α) ==>
       comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (π₂ · pr1 β),
 (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
  • z)
 • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
     (pr1 β))
  (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂:= maponpaths
  (λ z : comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (π₂ · pr1 α) ==>
         comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (π₂ · pr1 β),
   (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
      (pr1 α) • z)
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
       (pr1 β)) H₁: (rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁)))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β) =
(rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
 • (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)))
• lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 β)
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β

r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p

H₂: rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁))
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
       (pr1 β)) =
rassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂ (pr1 α)
• ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂))
   • lassociator (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)) π₂
       (pr1 β))
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p

comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: id₂ (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ · pr1 α)

id₂ (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ · pr1 α)
• (comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: (pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
(pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: (pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
(pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
H₃:= maponpaths
  (λ z : (pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
         · pr1 α ==>
         (pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
         · pr1 β,
   z
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
      ▹ pr1 β)) H₂: (λ z : (pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
            (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
       · pr1 α ==>
       (pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
            (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
       · pr1 β,
 z
 • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
    ▹ pr1 β))
  ((pr2 h₁)
   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
   · π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
(λ z : (pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
            (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
       · pr1 α ==>
       (pr2 h₁)
       ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
            (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
       · pr1 β,
 z
 • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
    ▹ pr1 β))
  ((pr2 h₁)
   ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
   · π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: (pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
(pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
H₃:= maponpaths
  (λ z : (pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
         · pr1 α ==>
         (pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
         · pr1 β,
   z
   • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
      ▹ pr1 β)) H₂: ((pr2 h₁)
 ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
 · π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁)
• (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
   ▹ pr1 β) =
((pr2 h₁)
 ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁))
 · π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
• (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
   ▹ pr1 β)
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: (pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
(pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
H₃: (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₁) =
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₂)
pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: (pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
(pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
H₃: (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₁) =
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₂)
lunitor (pr1 α) • pr1 q₁ = lunitor (pr1 α) • pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: (pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
(pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
H₃: (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₁) =
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₂)
(id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)) ◃ pr1 q₁) • lunitor (pr1 β) =
(id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)) ◃ pr1 q₂) • lunitor (pr1 β)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p
H₁: comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁) =
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: (pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
(pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
H₃: (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₁) =
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₂)
id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)) ◃ pr1 q₁ =
id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)) ◃ pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α, β: slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧
p: comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) α ==>
comp_unit h₁ · # (pb_psfunctor B f) β
q₁, q₂: α ==> β
r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p
r₂: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₂ = p

comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) ◃ (π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂)
H₂: (pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₁ =
(pr2 h₁)
⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] (id₁
                                                (pr1
                                                 h₁))
· π₂ ◃ pr1 q₂
H₃: (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₁) =
(mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
   ▹ pr1 α)

r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p

   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ pr1 α)
• (id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)) ◃ pr1 q₂)

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

r₁: comp_unit h₁ ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) q₁ = p

 ▹ pr1 α) • (id₁ (pr1 h₁) ◃ pr1 q₂)

  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.

• (id₁ (pr1 (comp_ob h₁)) ◃ pr1 q₂)

    exact H₃.
  Qed.

  (**
   5. Essentially surjective
   *)
  Definition comp_essentially_surj_mor
             {h₁ : slice_bicat b₁}
             {h₂ : slice_bicat b₂}
             (α : h₁ --> pb_psfunctor B f h₂)
    : pr1 h₁ --> pr1 h₂
    := pr1 α · π₂.

  Definition comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell
             {h₁ : slice_bicat b₁}
             {h₂ : slice_bicat b₂}
             (α : h₁ --> pb_psfunctor B f h₂)
    : invertible_2cell
        (pr2 h₁ · f)
        (comp_essentially_surj_mor α · pr2 h₂)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ (pr2 α))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                  _
                  (pb_cell _ _))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))).

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob h₁, h₂ ⟧

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
B ⟦ pr1 (comp_ob h₁), pr1 h₂ ⟧
 exact (comp_essentially_surj_mor α).
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell (pr2 (comp_ob h₁))
  (comp_essentially_surj_mor α · pr2 h₂)
 exact (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α).
  Defined.

  Section EssentiallySurjective.
    Context {h₁ : slice_bicat b₁}
            {h₂ : slice_bicat b₂}
            (α : h₁ --> pb_psfunctor B f h₂).

    Local Arguments lassociator {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}.
    Local Arguments rassociator {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}.

    Definition comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr1
      : comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α) · π₁
        ==>
        pr1 α · π₁
      := rassociator
         • (_ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr1 _ _)
         • mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 _ _ _
         • pr12 α.

    Definition comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr2
      : comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · (f /≃₁ comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α) · π₂
        ==>
        pr1 α · π₂
      := rassociator
         • (_ ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 _ _)
         • lassociator
         • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 _ _ _ ▹ _)
         • lunitor _.

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
(((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
   · (f /≃₁ comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α)
   ◃ pb_cone_cell
       (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂))))
  • lassociator)
 • (comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr2 ▹ pr2 h₂))
• rassociator =
((lassociator • (comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator)
• (pr1 α
   ◃ pb_cone_cell
       (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂))))

   ◃ pb_cone_cell
       (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂))))
  • lassociator)
 • (comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr2 ▹ pr2 h₂))
• rassociator =
((lassociator • (comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr1 ▹ f))
 • rassociator)
• (pr1 α
   ◃ pb_cone_cell
       (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂))))

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

lassociator
• ((((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)

h₂: slice_bicat b₂

((((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
    ◃ (f /≃₁ comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α
       ◃ pb_cone_cell
           (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂)))))

B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ (f /≃₁ comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α
    ◃ pb_cone_cell
        (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂)))))
• (lassociator
   • (lassociator
      • ((comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr2 ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • rassociator))) = ?b

        
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
◃ (f /≃₁ comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α
   ◃ pb_cone_cell
       (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂)))) = 
?y'

   • ((comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr1 ▹ f)
      • (rassociator
         • (pr1 α
            ◃ pb_cone_cell
                (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂)))))))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
      (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α) ▹ f))
• (lassociator
   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
       ▹ f)
      • (linvunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                   (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)
            • (rassociator
               • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                   ◃ (π₂
                      ◃ ((pr2 α ▹ f)
                         • (rassociator
                            • ((pr1 α ◃ pb_cell f ...)
                               • lassociator)))))
                  • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                      ◃ lassociator)
                     • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                         ◃ ((pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
                               (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell
                                  α)) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₂))
                        • ((comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
                            ◃ rassociator)
                           • (lassociator
                              • (lassociator
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator)))))))))))) =
?b

α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
 ◃ ((pr2 α ▹ f)
    • (rassociator
       • ((pr1 α ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) • lassociator))))
• (rassociator • lassociator) = ?y'

        
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁) · π₂
 ◃ ((pr2 α ▹ f)
    • (rassociator
       • ((pr1 α ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂)) • lassociator))))
• id₂
    ((pr2 h₁)
     ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁)) · π₂
     · (comp_essentially_surj_mor α · pr2 h₂)) = ?y'

        apply id2_right.

   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
       ▹ f)

         • (((mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁)
                (id₁ (pr1 h₁))

                   (pr2 h₁ · f))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁ · f)

                       · pr2 h₂)) • lassociator)
                • (lunitor
                     (comp_essentially_surj_mor α)
                   ▹ pr2 h₂)) • rassociator))))) =
lassociator
• ((lassociator ▹ f)
   • ((comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr1 ▹ f)
      • (rassociator
         • (pr1 α
            ◃ pb_cone_cell
                (pr1 (pr2 B b₁ (pr1 h₂) b₂ f (pr2 h₂)))))))

h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
(comp_unit_mor (pr2 h₁)
 ◃ (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
      (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α) ▹ f))
• (lassociator
   • ((mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
       ▹ f)
      • (linvunitor (pr2 h₁ · f)
         • ((id₁ (pr1 h₁)
             ◃ ((pr2 α ▹ f)
                • (rassociator
                   • ((pr1 α ◃ pb_cell f (pr2 h₂))
                      • lassociator))))
            • (lunitor
                 (comp_essentially_surj_mor α · pr2 h₂)
               • rassociator))))) = ?b

      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)) ▹ f))
• (pr2 α ▹ f) =
(lassociator ▹ f)
• (comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr1 ▹ f)

                 (pr2 h₁ · f))) • pr12 α))) = ?b

  (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α))
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pr12 α)

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (pb_on_1cell_pr1 f
     (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr1 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pr12 α)
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (comp_essentially_surj_cell_pr2 α)
 
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((rassociator
        ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁)))
        (f /≃₁ comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α)
        π₂
      • ((pr2 h₁)
         ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
         (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         ◃ pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
             (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α)))
     • lassociator
         ((pr2 h₁)
          ⊗[ linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)] 
          (id₁ (pr1 h₁))) π₂
         (comp_essentially_surj_mor α))
    • (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f))
       ▹ comp_essentially_surj_mor α))
   • lunitor (comp_essentially_surj_mor α))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α))
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))

      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (pb_on_1cell_pr2 f
     (comp_essentially_surj_mor_inv2cell α))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (mor_to_pb_obj_pr2 (pr2 h₁) (id₁ (pr1 h₁))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 h₁ · f)))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell
  (comp_unit h₁
   · # (pb_psfunctor B f) (comp_essentially_surj α)) α

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell
  (comp_unit h₁
   · # (pb_psfunctor B f) (comp_essentially_surj α)) α

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
comp_unit h₁
· # (pb_psfunctor B f) (comp_essentially_surj α) ==> α
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell ?η

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
comp_unit h₁
· # (pb_psfunctor B f) (comp_essentially_surj α) ==> α
 exact (comp_essentially_surj_cell_slice α).
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
h₁: slice_bicat b₁
h₂: slice_bicat b₂
α: slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ h₁, pb_psfunctor B f h₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (comp_essentially_surj_cell_slice α)
 exact (comp_essentially_surj_is_inv2cell α).
  Defined.

  (**
   6. Universal arrow
   *)
  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
left_universal_arrow (pb_psfunctor B f)

  
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
left_universal_arrow (pb_psfunctor B f)

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
is_univalent_2_1 (slice_bicat b₂)
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
slice_bicat b₁ → slice_bicat b₂
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
∏ x : slice_bicat b₁,
slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ x, pb_psfunctor B f (?L x) ⟧
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
∏ (x : slice_bicat b₁) (y : slice_bicat b₂)
(f0 g : slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ ?L x, y ⟧)
(α : ?η x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) f0 ==>
     ?η x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) g),
∑ β : f0 ==> g, ?η x ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) β = α
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
∏ (x : slice_bicat b₁) (y : slice_bicat b₂)
(f0 g : slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ ?L x, y ⟧)
(α : ?η x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) f0 ==>
     ?η x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) g)
(β₁ β₂ : f0 ==> g),
?η x ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) β₁ = α
→ ?η x ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) β₂ = α → β₁ = β₂
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
∏ (x : slice_bicat b₁) (y : slice_bicat b₂)
(f0 : slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ x, pb_psfunctor B f y ⟧),
∑ g : slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ ?L x, y ⟧,
invertible_2cell (?η x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) g) f0

    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
is_univalent_2_1 (slice_bicat b₂)
 
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
slice_bicat b₁ → slice_bicat b₂
 exact comp_ob.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
∏ x : slice_bicat b₁,
slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ x, pb_psfunctor B f (comp_ob x) ⟧
 exact comp_unit.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
∏ (x : slice_bicat b₁) (y : slice_bicat b₂)
(f0 g : slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob x, y ⟧)
(α : comp_unit x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) f0 ==>
     comp_unit x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) g),
∑ β : f0 ==> g,
comp_unit x ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) β = α
 exact (λ h₁ h₂ α β p,
             comp_full _ _ p ,, comp_full_eq _ _ p).
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
∏ (x : slice_bicat b₁) (y : slice_bicat b₂)
(f0 g : slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob x, y ⟧)
(α : comp_unit x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) f0 ==>
     comp_unit x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) g)
(β₁ β₂ : f0 ==> g),
comp_unit x ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) β₁ = α
→ comp_unit x ◃ ## (pb_psfunctor B f) β₂ = α → β₁ = β₂
 exact @comp_faithful.
    
B: bicat_with_pb
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
∏ (x : slice_bicat b₁) (y : slice_bicat b₂)
(f0 : slice_bicat b₁ ⟦ x, pb_psfunctor B f y ⟧),
∑ g : slice_bicat b₂ ⟦ comp_ob x, y ⟧,
invertible_2cell
  (comp_unit x · # (pb_psfunctor B f) g) f0
 exact (λ h₁ h₂ α, comp_essentially_surj α ,, comp_essentially_surj_inv2cell α).
  Defined.
End Composition.
